articles.author: John Power
articles.title: US stock market jumps as US-Iran deal stirs hopes for end to energy turmoil - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Benchmark S&P 500 rises 1.7 percent, while tech-heavy Nasdaq jumps 3.1 percent.
articles.content:
US stocks have rallied on hopes that the tentative deal to end the US-Israel war on Iran will restore stability to energy supply chains roiled by months of disruption in the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Texas Tech will not attempt to recover NIL money paid to Brendan Sorsby - NBC Sports
articles.description: Cody Campbell issues long statement regarding Sorsby's exit from Texas Tech.
articles.content:
Brendan Sorsby has officially moved on from Texas Tech, without ever suiting up for a single game.
For its part, Texas Tech will not seek reimbursement of NIL payments already made to Sorsby.

articles.author: Adam Clark, Kit Norton
articles.title: Why Fox Stock Is Tumbling After $22 Billion Roku Deal - Barron's
articles.description: Fox Corp. has agreed to buy streaming technology maker Roku for $160 a share, or an enterprise value of around $22 billion.
articles.content:
Fox Corp. stock tumbled on Monday after it agreed to buy streaming technology makerRokufor $22 billion for stock and cash.
